title: Chief Technician
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|Chief}}
{{Expand|Lacking details from sources}}
'''Chief Technician''' was a title held by individuals who were in command of teams of [[Technician/Legends|technicians]].<ref name="HS">''[[Hideouts & Strongholds]]''</ref> Some Chief Technicians specialized in the field of [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] and vehicle repair,<ref name="SESB">''[[Shadows of the Empire Sourcebook]]''</ref> while other Chief Technicians were employed in [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] maintenance.<ref name="HS" />

==Known Chief Technicians==
*[[Ablee Bansak]] was a Chief Technician at [[Estaria Central Starport]] specializing in [[Hangar/Legends|hangar]] operations. He commanded a team of ten other technicians.<ref name="HS" />
*[[Viera Cheran]] was the Chief Technician of [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] until she sabotaged [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles']] [[R2-series astromech droid/Legends|R2-series astromech droid]] in order to attempt to kill [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]].<ref name="SESB" />

==Behind the scenes==
A Chief Technician is a non-commissioned rank within the Royal Air Force held by airmen with technical experience.
